FORGE standard report

Seal status

VERIFIED

Findings

tools/evolution_bundle.py

Agent: bug_investigator · Severity: MEDIUM · Category: INFERRED · Outcome: OBSERVED

The parser call `return json.loads(Path(path).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))` at tools/evolution_bundle.py:548 has no nearby exception handling, so malformed input may escape as an opaque failure.

tools/evolution_bundle.py:548: return json.loads(Path(path).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

tools/verify_bundle.py

Agent: bug_investigator · Severity: MEDIUM · Category: INFERRED · Outcome: OBSERVED

The decision comparison `return False, f"Verdict {verdict} but speedup={speedup_s} < 1.0"` at tools/verify_bundle.py:404 uses a binary float threshold, so rounding at the boundary may flip the result.

tools/verify_bundle.py:404: return False, f"Verdict {verdict} but speedup={speedup_s} < 1.0"

Limitations

  • The seal proves findings were not altered after sealing.
  • The seal does not prove findings are correct.
  • A full-access attacker can forge a consistent replacement chain from scratch.
